note: Operationalizes the Corridor Atlas §8 stakeholder-projection concept. A controlled set of actor personas, each mapped to (a) the C1–C8 constraints that bear on it and (b) the corridor archetypes (RC/SC/TC/DC) it engages. The projection profile_for(stakeholder, edge) RE-PROJECTS the already-derived corridor class, the substrate poles, and the edge's inbound mechanism through a persona's lens — it introduces NO new legal facts and inherits the verification status of the cells it reads (so a profile is preview, not citable authority, until those cells are verified). The persona list is the register's operationalization and is itself subject to confirmation against the §8 source text.

issuer.label: Stablecoin issuer (L1)
issuer.lens: May I issue, and will my token be admitted into the destination?

distributor.label: Distributor / wallet / PSP (L2 routing)
distributor.lens: What may I do in the routing chain without becoming an unlicensed issuer or broker?

reserve_custodian.label: Reserve custodian
reserve_custodian.lens: What reserve composition and segregation must I hold, and is data sharing constrained?

home_regulator.label: Home (origin) regulator
home_regulator.lens: Can I supervise outbound use and share information with the host?

host_regulator.label: Host (destination) regulator
host_regulator.lens: Under what conditions may a foreign token circulate here?

corporate_treasury.label: Corporate treasury (rail user)
corporate_treasury.lens: Can I move value on this rail, at scale, and how do I book it?

token_holder.label: Institutional holder / investor (TC)
token_holder.lens: What am I holding — is it a security, is it yield-bearing, is the reserve sound?
